race.description: Tamworth Jockey Club Punters Club Day Mdn Plate
race.comment: BRITISH GEM (9) was thereabouts two starts ago before a disappointing eighth most recently over 1500m at Newcastle. Backmarker who gets home hard. Leading contender. ZORKO (6) improved last time out, finishing half a length from the winner in third at the end of 1400m at Inverell after being prominent at the bend. Finds a suitable assignment and can find winning form. ERNIEGY (2) had been performing well until racing below his best last time when fifth over 1450m at Quirindi. Can atone. PURPLE PRINCE (4) was beaten 7 lengths into seventh in a 1200m contest at Port Macquarie last time out. No surprise to see him in contention.
